title: General Hospital
description: A 200-bedded general hospital located at Hamirpur. The brief includes the Chief Medical Officer / Medical Superintendent office, Emergency, Out-Patient and In-Patient Departments, Operation Theatres, Diagnostic Services, a Maternity ward, an Administrative Block, and Private, Semi-Private and General wards.

title: NIT Hamirpur Administration Block
description: Reimagining the NIT Hamirpur campus as an inclusive, sustainable and accessible university campus on a flat site. The Administration Block houses the student and registrar offices, accounts and finance, admission and enquiry, a non-technical staff room, the Dean / Director / DSW rooms, and a meeting and archive room.

title: Exhibition Pavilion
description: A pavilion redesigned at Pragati Maidan, New Delhi to accommodate exhibitions of all scales — from small exhibits to large equipment — with space for both permanent and temporary displays. The programme includes an entrance hall / lobby / foyer, main and temporary exhibition halls, storage, an administration office with meeting room, a cafeteria / food court, and toilets.

title: Residence
description: Working drawings for a 2 BHK residence with a built-up area of approximately 200 m². The set includes the ground floor plan, first floor plan, elevations and detail drawings.

title: Beauty Salon
description: Assisted in designing reception tables for beauty salons and residential apartments, focusing on client requirements, spatial constraints, and aesthetics. Conducted on-site measurements and coordinated with contractors to ensure accuracy in execution, gaining hands-on experience in furniture installation and finishing.
